summary: Tested CV Logo Footer Integration - Re'Actif Pro logo correctly added to DOCX and PDF CV files. All 10 tests passed (100%).

_build_docx() correctly adds logo to footer with RIGHT alignment via WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.RIGHT - VERIFIED
_build_pdf() correctly adds logo via onFirstPage/onLaterPages callback at bottom-right position - VERIFIED
DOCX footer contains: word/media/image1.png, word/footer1.xml with drawing=True, right_align=True, embed=True - VERIFIED
PDF contains image objects: XObject=True, Image=True, FlateDecode=True (PNG compression) - VERIFIED
GET /api/cv/download/{model_type} returns valid DOCX with logo - VERIFIED
GET /api/cv/download-pdf/{model_type} returns valid PDF with logo - VERIFIED
